name: LangChain

pricing_unit: BYOK LLM + optional LangGraph Cloud seat tier
notes: F3 (ad-hoc dispatchers) native fit per i76-madeira-elevation.md §2 F3 row. KiRBe-narrowing-to-2-finalists candidate per D-IH-84-E (LlamaIndex-continue + LangGraph-workflow).

name: LlamaIndex
pricing_unit: BYOK LLM + storage costs for index
notes: KiRBe runs on this substrate per founder framing 2026-05-16: 'KiRBe is still on the LlamaIndex-era stack'. Dominant RAG framework in Holistika usage. LlamaIndex Workflows GA 2026.

name: OpenClaw
pricing_unit: BYOK LLM via configured providers
notes: Holistika's current default agent runtime; thin adapter over upstream frameworks with policy + observability hooks. Quarterly re-bless cadence per AGENTIC_FRAMEWORK_LANDSCAPE.md §5. B1 anchor for D-IH-84-B (stay-on-OpenClaw).

name: CrewAI
pricing_unit: BYOK core + Enterprise tier seat-billed
notes: F2 (peer companions) native fit per i76-madeira-elevation.md §2 F2 row. 'Team of AICs' rhetoric maps directly to crew abstraction. CrewAI Enterprise GA.

name: Ollama
pricing_unit: Operator hardware cost only
notes: Holistika local-iteration sandbox; production-stable for sandbox use. Local hardware constraints per AGENTIC_FRAMEWORK_LANDSCAPE.md §1 risk column.

name: VercelAI SDK
pricing_unit: BYOK LLM + Vercel Pro seat $20/user/mo
notes: F4 fit (single-agent + rich-tools). Vercel AI SDK v4 GA. Vendor lock-in to Vercel platform; abstract behind helper layer.

name: Groq Cloud
pricing_unit: Very low per-token; flagship pricing advantage
notes: One of several providers behind shared interface per model_catalog.py. Provider availability + rate limits per AGENTIC_FRAMEWORK_LANDSCAPE.md §1 risk column.

name: Cursor SDK
pricing_unit: $20/user Pro or $40/user Business plus LLM included
notes: SDK in BETA as of 2026-Q2 (founder framing 2026-05-16 named this as competitive window). Cursor 3 'Glass' GA 2026-04-02. Anysphere reportedly at $2B ARR; Composer 2 built on Moonshot Kimi 2.5. B2/B3 anchor for D-IH-84-B; F1 native fit (subagent_types pattern).

name: Claude Code SDK
pricing_unit: Claude pricing - premium per-token but high capability
notes: F4 (single-agent rich-tools) native fit per i76-madeira-elevation.md §2 F4 row. Claude Code GA 2025; SDK matured 2026-Q1. Anthropic Projects companion is competitive analogue to Madeira workspace pattern.

name: OpenAI Agents SDK
pricing_unit: Standard OpenAI pricing comparable to Claude at volume
notes: Agents SDK 1.0 GA 2025-Q4; Assistants API predecessor deprecated. Swarm pattern + nested-agent calls first-party support F1. Most-adopted developer-agent SDK by volume.

name: AG2
vendor: AG2 Open Source / Microsoft Research lineage
pricing_unit: BYOK
notes: F2 fit (group-chat pattern). Post-AutoGen community fork ratified 2025; Microsoft maintains separate AutoGen successor (naming churn creates ecosystem confusion; pin specific fork at adoption time).

name: Letta
pricing_unit: BYOK self-hosted or Letta Cloud seat-billed
notes: Memory framework (formerly MemGPT); persistent agent state survives context-window boundaries. Letta Cloud GA 2025-Q3. Relevant to MADEIRA C-76-3 persistence question per i76-madeira-elevation.md §5; pairs with any F-framing.

name: Devin
pricing_unit: $500/mo Team plan
notes: NOT a substrate AKOS can run on - this is a competitor product (autonomous software-engineering agent). Row preserved per audit-trail per P1 §4.6 reclassification finding; akos_integration_state=rejected documents the consideration + the reject reason.

name: Replit Agent
pricing_unit: $25/mo Core
notes: NOT a substrate AKOS can run on - this is a competitor product (Replit IDE-integrated agent; app-generation focused). Row preserved per audit-trail per P1 §4.7 reclassification finding; akos_integration_state=rejected documents the consideration + the reject reason.

name: OpenClaw thin-adapter pattern
pricing_unit: Same as OpenClaw base substrate
notes: B1 anchor for D-IH-84-B. The architectural-posture pattern that AKOS currently runs on; Holistika owns policy + observability; quarterly re-bless cadence. Strength: maximally aligned with governance; AKOS-as-SSOT preserved by design. Weakness: bootstrap drift risk.

name: Hybrid Cursor-SDK frontend + OpenClaw policy backend
pricing_unit: Cursor seat + LLM via OpenClaw configured providers
notes: B3 anchor for D-IH-84-B (recommended-pending-evidence default per decision-log). Best-of-both: operator-facing UX maturity (Cursor SDK) + governance discipline retention (OpenClaw policy backend). Integration surface complexity; OpenClaw must be repackaged as middleware compatible with Cursor SDK agent lifecycle.

name: MADEIRA-direct: build-your-own runtime per-method
pricing_unit: BYOK LLM
notes: The historical baseline (Madeira-on-LlamaIndex era; KiRBe still runs this pattern per founder framing 2026-05-16). KiRBe akos_integration_state is in-production for KiRBe product; rejected for AKOS substrate role (replaced by OpenClaw). Relevant to D-IH-84-D D1 library-only productization path + D-IH-84-E KiRBe narrowing input.

name: KiRBe (AI Archivist + universal ingestor)
pricing_unit: BYOK LLM + storage costs for vault
notes: KiRBe is Holistika's AI Archivist + universal ingestor library (operator framing I80 P7 Round 9: 'sort of like Composio but with a wider scope'). Currently runs ON SUBS-RUN-LLAMA-LLAMAINDEX per founder framing 2026-05-16; distinct substrate row because KiRBe is itself becoming a consumable substrate (multi-tenant customer vaults forward-charter at I83 P5 + I84 expansion). Brownfield substrate per D-IH-83-D: existing POC refactored + versioned (rejected Composio adoption). I83 P2 lands ingestor MVP behind kirbe.* or holistika_ops.kirbe_* schema (D-IH-83-C deferred to P1).

name: Holistika obsidian-reader (alpha experiment)
pricing_unit: Local-only; no LLM costs at substrate layer
notes: Operator's alpha-experiment Obsidian-vault reader. Already registered at REPOSITORY_REGISTRY.csv as kind=experiment status=active owner=AI Engineer (last reviewed D-IH-86-AC at I86 Wave I). Substrate-side registration here so I83 P0 can cross-reference + I83 successors can pair against use cases. Research lineage that brought us closer to understanding AI per operator R-IH-83-2 commentary 2026-05-21. Not multi-tenant ready (single-user vault model); not in production (alpha-only). akos_integration_state=pilot acknowledges it has run far enough to inform doctrine without committing to maintain it as canonical infra.

name: DeepSeek V4 (Flash + Pro open-weight family)
pricing_unit: API per-token or self-host GPU-hour; Flash tier cost leader per MS-OSS research
notes: Candidate row minted per model-selection DQ-MS-03 (2026-05-28). Dual-tier OSS pick: V4-Flash for volume agents; V4-Pro for long-context hard coding. Holistika eval required before status=active (benchmark skepticism SRC-MS-16/17). DQ-MS-01: API allowed internal-only default; SUEZ-class engagements self-host or controlled inference unless engagement addendum ratifies API.

name: Kimi K2.6 (Moonshot open-weight agentic family)
pricing_unit: API or hosted inference; Modified MIT license class at scale
notes: Candidate row minted per model-selection DQ-MS-03 (2026-05-28). Multi-agent / long-horizon coding tier in MS-OSS prong. Composer 2.5 Cursor agent shares Kimi K2.5 lineage per SRC-MS-02 — DQ-MS-02: no internal Cursor block; external register uses capability/residency framing not origin politics. Eval gate before active; engagement-scoped API restrictions per DQ-MS-01.
